name: tether-md-monorepo
description: Tether MD — anchored comments for Markdown that AI agents act on, but never apply (monorepo root).

scripts.build: npm run build -w @tether-md/kernel && npm run build -w tether-md && npm run build -w tether-md-vscode
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @tether-md/kernel && npm run typecheck -w tether-md && npm run typecheck -w tether-md-vscode
scripts.test: npm run test -w @tether-md/kernel && npm run test -w tether-md && npm run test -w tether-md-vscode
